title: Solana Developer Path
description: The complete path from zero to Solana developer. Start with the fundamentals, learn Rust for blockchain, master the Anchor framework, and build production-ready dApp frontends.

title: DeFi Builder Path
description: Specialize in decentralized finance on Solana. Build on your Solana development skills to understand AMMs, lending protocols, token mechanics, and create DeFi primitives.
